title: MACP Run Descriptor
description: Scenario-agnostic execution descriptor posted by a scenario-producing tier (e.g., examples-service) to a control plane's `POST /runs` endpoint. The control plane does not decode scenario semantics (RFC-MACP-0004 §3, direct-agent-auth architecture). It returns {runId, sessionId, ...} and observes the session the initiator agent opens on the runtime.

mode.description: Execution mode. 'replay' is exposed as a separate endpoint.

kind.description: Runtime provider kind (e.g., 'rust'). Selects the control-plane's runtime provider.

sessionId.description: Optional caller-provided session id. Must satisfy runtime validation: UUID v4/v7 or base64url 22+ chars. If omitted, the control plane allocates a UUID v4 and echoes it in the response.

modeName.description: Canonical mode identifier (e.g. 'macp.mode.decision.v1'). Opaque to the control plane; bound at SessionStart by the initiator agent.

modeVersion.description: Semantic mode version bound at SessionStart.

policyVersion.description: Policy identifier bound at SessionStart (RFC-MACP-0012 §6.1). Opaque to the control plane. Empty → runtime resolves to 'policy.default'.

ttlMs.description: Session TTL in milliseconds. Runtime accepts 1..86_400_000 (runtime/src/session.rs).

id.description: Participant sender id. Plain string; the 'agent://' prefix is a convention, not a protocol requirement (RFC-MACP-0001 §6).

participants.description: Declared participants. Used for audit/projection only; no roles, no per-participant semantics.

context.description: Optional opaque context blob. Control plane persists it as metadata but does NOT decode it. Initiator agent may embed this verbatim in its SessionStart payload.

metadata.description: Free-form transport-layer metadata (environment label, source tag, cancelCallback coordinates, cancellationDelegated flag). Opaque to the runtime.

cancelCallback.description: HTTP endpoint the control plane calls when the UI triggers cancel (direct-agent-auth Option A — initiator agent forwards CancelSession).

url.description: Callback URL on the initiator agent.

bearer.description: Optional shared-secret Bearer token for the callback.

cancellationDelegated.description: Option B: when true and the session's policy grants commitment authority to the control-plane identity, the control plane calls CancelSession directly on the runtime instead of the callback (RFC-MACP-0001 §7.2).

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key; control plane returns the existing run on 409.

tags.description: UI-facing tags. Scenario-free; no runtime semantics.
